text: Meeting automation summary for Sample Product Review

text.text:
*Summary*
Identified 5 action item(s), 3 decision(s), and 2 risk(s) from the meeting notes.

*Jira tickets created*
- <dry-run://jira/DRY-001|DRY-001>: draft validation copy for incomplete scan uploads
- <dry-run://jira/DRY-002|DRY-002>: add reviewer rotation rules to the technical plan
- <dry-run://jira/DRY-003|DRY-003>: create a one-page clinician pilot guide
- <dry-run://jira/DRY-004|DRY-004>: confirm whether Jira labels should include clinical-pilot and annotation-workflow
- <dry-run://jira/DRY-005|DRY-005>: schedule the pilot readiness review for next week

*Decisions*
- Use the existing Jira project for workflow follow-up instead of creating a separate tracker.
- Keep the first release focused on annotation upload, review assignment, and uncertainty escalation.
- Pilot with 20 retrospective ultrasound studies before expanding to live cases.

*Risks / watchouts*
- If reviewer assignment is unclear, pilot feedback may be noisy.
- If the clinician guide is late, onboarding will slip.
